modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to update text on the USD website.

full_description_text: So, during the call, the user mentioned they need to update some text on the USD website, right? They want to change the existing text, add a new line, and also remove some old text that’s just not relevant anymore. It sounds like they’re looking for a complete refresh of the content, which is pretty important for marketing, you know? They really want to make sure everything is up-to-date and reflects the current messaging.
short_description: Request to update text on the USD website.
description: So, during the call, the user mentioned they need to update some text on the USD website, right? They want to change the existing text, add a new line, and also remove some old text that’s just not relevant anymore. It sounds like they’re looking for a complete refresh of the content, which is pretty important for marketing, you know? They really want to make sure everything is up-to-date and reflects the current messaging.
